chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1090 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 1. For orders on CMA No.6746/2024 (Ex.A) 2.
